name: Precision Boring & Reaming — ISO Fit Selection, Tolerance Band & Achievable Surface Roughness
subtitle: CNC Machining | Precision Engineering | Metrology — ISO 286-1:2010, ISO 286-2:2010 (preferred fits)

inScope: Precision Boring & Reaming — ISO Fit Selection, Tolerance Band & Achievable Surface Roughness
scope.boundaryWarning: Engineering decision support only — verify before use.

enum.label: IT5 — Precision bearings, gauge bores (Ra ≤ 0.4 µm)
IT6 — General precision, ball bearings (Ra ≤ 0.8 µm)
IT8 — Medium precision, loose fits (Ra ≤ 3.2 µm)
IT9 — Coarse press fits, rough bores (Ra ≤ 6.3 µm)
H — Zero lower deviation (standard hole basis)

inputs.label: Mating Shaft Designation (e.g. h6, f7, k6)

enum.label: Honing after boring — IT5–IT6, Ra 0.05–0.4 µm

standards.name: Precision Boring & Reaming — ISO Fit Selection, Tolerance Band & Achievable Surface Roughness
standards.description: Precision Boring & Reaming — ISO Fit Selection, Tolerance Band & Achievable Surface Roughness — CNC Machining, Precision Engineering, Metrology

formulas.expression: D_mean = Math.sqrt(Math.max(1, nominal_diameter_mm - 3) * nominal_diameter_mm); i_micron = 0.45 * Math.pow(D_mean, 1/3) + 0.001 * D_mean; const IT_factor = {5:7, 6:10, 7:16, 8:25, 9:40}; IT_um = IT_factor[ISO_hole_tolerance] * i_micron
EI_um = 0; ES_um = IT_um; bore_min_mm = nominal_diameter_mm + EI_um/1000; bore_max_mm = nominal_diameter_mm + ES_um/1000
formulas.reference: ISO 286-1 — H basis: EI = 0 (lower deviation); ES = +IT; bore Φ_min to Φ_max

formulas.expression: const shaft_offsets = {h6:{ei:-IT_um*0.4, es:0}, h7:{ei:-IT_um*0.6, es:0}, f7:{ei:-IT_um*1.6, es:-IT_um}, g6:{ei:-IT_um*0.7, es:-IT_um*0.3}, k6:{ei:0, es:IT_um*0.5}, p6:{ei:IT_um*0.5, es:IT_um*1.2}, s6:{ei:IT_um*1.2, es:IT_um*2.0}}; const sf = shaft_offsets[shaft_designation]; shaft_min_mm = nominal_diameter_mm + sf.ei/1000; shaft_max_mm = nominal_diameter_mm + sf.es/1000
formulas.reference: ISO 286-1 Table 3 — shaft fundamental deviations; approximate for common designations
Clearance > 0 = clearance fit; < 0 = interference; between = transition — ISO 286-1 §3

formulas.expression: n_rpm = Vc_m_min * 1000 / (Math.PI * nominal_diameter_mm); Vf_mm_min = n_rpm * feed_per_rev_mm
formulas.reference: n = V_c × 1000 / (π × D); V_f = n × f_r — machining parameter calculation

formulas.expression: const Ra_cap = {fine_boring:[0.2,0.8], reaming:[0.4,1.6], rough_boring:[3.2,12.5], honing:[0.05,0.4]}; const rc = Ra_cap[boring_tool]; Ra_achievable_min=rc[0]; Ra_achievable_max=rc[1]; const IT_Ra_map = {5:0.4, 6:0.8, 7:1.6, 8:3.2, 9:6.3}; Ra_req_max = IT_Ra_map[ISO_hole_tolerance]; process_capable = Ra_achievable_max <= Ra_req_max
formulas.reference: ISO 2768 / Kalpakjian §26 — surface roughness vs IT grade correlation; process must achieve Ra ≤ Ra_req

validation.message: Selected boring/reaming process cannot achieve required Ra for specified IT grade — upgrade to finer process (e.g., add honing after boring for IT5/IT6)
Minimum clearance > 200 µm: very loose fit — verify shaft designation is correct; this may cause bearing misalignment or excessive play
Table feed > 500 mm/min for reaming: excessive — maximum feed for reaming is typically 150 mm/min; higher feeds cause chatter marks and dimensional errors

warnings.message: Unexpected interference fit: verify shaft designation — transition fits (k6) can have interference but assembly may require press or thermal expansion method
IT tolerance < 10 µm required but rough boring selected: this process cannot hold ≤ IT5 — mandatory fine boring or honing; tool setup and thermal stabilisation critical
Large bore (D > 500 mm) with tight IT6 tolerance: thermal expansion alone can exceed IT value — workpiece must be measured at 20°C ±1°C per ISO 1 temperature standard
Reaming speed > 150 m/min: built-up edge and chatter risk — reaming is inherently a low-speed finishing process; reduce to 8–15 m/min for steel, 30–50 m/min for aluminium
Wide clearance band relative to IT: verify mating shaft tolerance is correctly specified — total system clearance variation may affect running accuracy or press-fit security

verdictText.warn: PASS — High Utilization: Peer Review Required
